title: BlockBoost
description: The best way to optimize your minecraft client !
body:
![AN OPTIMISATION MODPACK ! ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e4919b3ce0782da62d9adccf7b6908695bd107e.png)

  This modpack **aims to boost your FPS**. By adding **severals optimisations mods** like C2ME, Sodium and FerriteCore ( Of course, there are much more ). But also, some unknowns mods like ThreatenGL, Noisium etc .. 

  Install this modpack if you want to play at Minecraft on any server without the fear of lagging !. 
I'm working on a version with QOL mods ! Install other mods at your own risk ! Because it may break the game. 
If you need help or want to suggest some modifications, you should go on our Discord ! 
![https://discord.gg/nDwszhjztG](https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/xQ-meXSBylIU8VKA7yUQXDwRu99JX8ic7mAsM4sBidjRgtMyhBDmYD4CpATqrdc1SA=w240-h480-rw)
